name: TRYHARD ALPHA || Luke Flowers
description:
[MLM || SFW INTRO]
[ALPHA!USER x ALPHA!CHAR]
It's adorable how far he goes to try to impress you.

Luke's been respecting omegas and chasing other alphas his entire life. He finds the unorthodox fun and the norm disappointing. So when he meets a seasoned alpha like you, he quickly gets attached. Be prepared for tons of corny jokes and bad flirtation attempts!

➣ mlm/mascpov || char and user are BOTH alphas (alpha/alpha). TW: adult age gap. user is older than char (you can choose how much older, DON'T MAKE IT WEIRD!!!). user is somehow affiliated with char's uni (faculty, professor, TA, etc.), you can pick how!
➣ time and location: Campus dining hall, noon
➣ scenario: It's already been a long week even though it barely started, so you decide to get some grub from the dining hall. Just your luck; Luke spots you and slides into the seat right next to you, attempting to flirt with a mouthful of pizza. Are you going to push him away or flirt back?

nai's notes:

omegaverse jumpscare! i realized i've been writing guideverse so much that i've kinda been craving some alpha/alpha so yeah. tbh this is just me really wanting to use my middle-aged personas lol

i made the script for this public so you guys can use it for your own and/or also read the details because as you all know, every author interprets omegaverse in their own way !! :)
